code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {Logistics_StockLevel] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [Logistics_Warehouse]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [Logistics_TrackingNumber]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {Logistics_FleetManagement] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [Logistics_StockLevel]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [Logistics_FleetManagement]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流系统画一个熔断器状态图。核心场景是DeliveryRoute调用，当StockLevel服务连续失败时触发熔断。整体分成三个主状态：CLOSED正常态、OPEN熔断态、HALF_OPEN半开恢复态。
明白了。CLOSED态内部需要细化吗？比如失败计数和阈值判断的逻辑？
对，CLOSED里面要有Normal子状态。execute_trade失败时走IncrementFailures，计数加一后进入CheckThreshold判断。小于3次回Normal，等于3次就触发熔断，跳转到Warehouse节点然后进入OPEN态。成功的话走ResetCount清零。
好的，CLOSED态内部结构画好了。OPEN态我理解为完全阻断，所有调用直接抛CircuitBreakerError？
没错，OPEN态里用BlockCalls拦截，同时CheckTimeout计时。60秒内保持阻断，超时后进入TrackingNumber节点，然后过渡到HALF_OPEN。
HALF_OPEN态的恢复逻辑怎么设计？只放行一个测试调用？
对，HALF_OPEN里用TestRecovery只允许一个测试调用，然后EvaluateResult判断结果。成功就回到StockLevel节点并关闭熔断；失败走ReOpen重新打开，回到FleetManagement节点。另外两个主状态之间的跳转也要标清楚：HALF_OPEN成功回CLOSED，失败回OPEN。
状态流转都画完了。最后给三个主状态上色区分吧？CLOSED用绿色，OPEN用红色，HALF_OPEN用黄色？
可以，颜色方案就这样。CLOSED绿色表示健康，OPEN红色表示熔断，HALF_OPEN黄色表示警戒恢复状态。整个图完成了。
